title: Mesh data plane vs control plane responsibilities
description: Explains how the control plane (e.g. istiod) configures sidecar proxies and how the data plane (Envoy) carries traffic and enforces policy.
body: Use when reasoning about how mesh config reaches traffic. Do not expect a config change to take effect without the proxies reloading. Actions: understand the control plane watches Kubernetes/mesh CRDs and pushes xDS config to each sidecar, the data plane proxies intercept inbound/outbound traffic via iptables and enforce routing/mTLS/policy, and config propagation is eventually consistent. Inspect with istioctl proxy-status to see sync state. Validation signals include proxy-status showing SYNCED and the new config present in the proxy dump. Risk boundary: a control-plane upgrade can disrupt config push and is operationally sensitive.
